case_title: CHUN JIE LIU VS. GREYHOUND LINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
